name: TabNavigation
visual_summary: A TabNavigation component is a navigational element that allows users to switch between different tabs, typically used in applications with multiple features or sections.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: TabNavigation
Description: A TabNavigation component is a navigational element that allows users to switch between different tabs, typically used in applications with multiple features or sections.
Style: e.g. dark, neutral
Interactions: clickable
Tags: navigation, tabs, ui-component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
